zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Simon Grindham於大約1256年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治。她於1277年與'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham"在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Grindham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greenham
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Greenham, one in Ashbrittle (Somerset), the other in Berkshire. The one in Somerset is named with an uncertain element, perhaps an Old English stream name Grinde ‘grinding one’, + hamm ‘water meadow’. The one in Berkshire was named in Old English with grēne ‘green’ + hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Mrs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Simon Grindham was born about 1256, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She married 'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham" in 1277, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.
